style.styleSentence: A peak-time club anthem driven by a sharp Afro-Caribbean riddim at high tempo featuring chest-rattling overdriven 808s, siren FX, and rapid-fire call-and-response toasting between a sultry female lead and raw male vocals.
style.vocalStyle: Aggressive, teasing, explicit delivery with rapid back-and-forth rap-singing
